main_hypothesis.justification: MH 'insufficient anti-scalant dosing + inadequate inhibitor performance new phosphonate 1.2 ppm → progressive scaling stage 2' — captura dosing/recovery pero no especifica CaCO3.

recommended_action.justification: Aumentar anti-scalant 2.5 ppm + monitor 72h — operacional, sin CIP.

requested_data.justification: Pide silica concentration in permeate — lugar incorrecto para evaluar scaling severity.

decision_change_condition.justification: Confuso: 'if silica in permeate <10 + ΔP rises → biofouling'. Sílice en permeato no discrimina.

reviewer_notes: Mismo error conceptual que mistral-medium-3 / 002: medir sílice en permeato no discrimina scaling.
